visits.note: Patient presents with new onset of fatigue and increased thirst. Physical examination reveals obesity and hypertension. HbA1c 7.5, BP 150/90, eGFR 80, LDL 140. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension. Medications: Metformin 500mg BID, Lisinopril 10mg QD.

Follow-up visit for worsening fatigue and shortness of breath. Physical examination reveals orthopnea and peripheral edema. HbA1c 8.1, BP 160/95, eGFR 70, LDL 145. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hypertensive Heart Disease. Medications: Metformin 1000mg BID, Lisinopril 20mg QD, Furosemide 40mg QD.

Follow-up visit for worsening renal function and hyperlipidemia. Physical examination reveals decreased kidney function and increased risk of cardiovascular disease. HbA1c 8.5, BP 155/100, eGFR 60, LDL 160. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hypertensive Heart Disease, Chronic Kidney Disease. Medications: Metformin 2000mg BID, Lisinopril 30mg QD, Furosemide 80mg QD, Rosuvastatin 20mg QD.

Follow-up visit for worsening hyperlipidemia and cardiovascular disease. Physical examination reveals increased risk of cardiovascular disease and decreased kidney function. HbA1c 7.8, BP 140/80, eGFR 55, LDL 180. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hypertensive Heart Disease, Chronic Kidney Disease, Hyperlipidemia. Medications: Metformin 2000mg BID, Lisinopril 30mg QD, Furosemide 80mg QD, Rosuvastatin 40mg QD, Atorvastatin 20mg QD.

Follow-up visit for continued worsening of renal function. Physical examination reveals decreased kidney function and increased risk of cardiovascular disease. HbA1c 9.0, BP 135/75, eGFR 50, LDL 170. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hypertensive Heart Disease, Chronic Kidney Disease, Hyperlipidemia. Medications: Metformin 2500mg BID, Lisinopril 40mg QD, Furosemide 100mg QD, Rosuvastatin 60mg QD, Atorvastatin 30mg QD.
